## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines in [`.editorconfig`](.editorconfig)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where applicable
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`dotnet test` / `npm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] I have updated [README.md](README.md) if my change affects public-facing behaviour
- [ ] I have signed the [CLA](https://cla.opensource.microsoft.com) (first-time contributors only)
